# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: Why AI-assisted DSA practice works on CodeGrind
- Summary: Showcase how AI-assisted guidance complements DSA practice on CodeGrind, highlighting real-time hints, problem-solving prompts, and progression through a sample challenge.
- Slug: codegrind-why-ai-assisted-dsa-practice-works
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-why-ai-assisted-dsa-practice-works
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-29-codegrind-why-ai-assisted-dsa-practice-works.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance to help learners scaffold reasoning, visualize concepts, and improve success rates through interactive feedback and progressive challenges.
- CTA: Try a sample problem with AI assistant guidance and share your learning progress.
- Visual brief: A short 15-20s demo video: screen captures of the CodeGrind editor with AI chat assistance, highlighting problem statement, real-time hints, and code feedback; include cyberpunk aesthetic hints and subtle UI glow to match CodeGrind branding.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
